title: Statistics for university staff and students | Stats NZ
content:
## Statistics for university staff and students
University staff and students can access Stats NZ data, customised for their research, often at no cost.
Stats NZ has a memorandum of understanding with the Council of New Zealand University Librarians (CONZUL) to provide customised data tables to university staff and students. See University contact officers .
This agreement enables academics, researchers, and students at all New Zealand universities to request ‘pre-paid’ customised tables from Stats NZ analysts. It fosters a closer working relationship between Stats NZ and New Zealand’s universities through the university librarians and easier access for academics and students to the wealth of information available from Stats NZ.
Customised, anonymised tables created for universities under this agreement are available to other CONZUL members on request after an embargo of at least a year.
Data packages for a wide variety of datasets are also available.
- Customised data tables available to universities
- Statistical data packages
- Confidentialised and synthetic unit record files
- University contact officers
Stats NZ continues to increase the amount of data on our website from all our collections, mostly as simple tables combining only a few variables. If you want to drill down further into the relationship between variables in our datasets you could benefit from customised tables.
Universities each have a set allocation of hours for customised data that are available to individuals for research purposes. This applies to all datasets produced by Stats NZ for which customised tables can be prepared.
University contact officers for the Stats NZ CONZUL agreement at each university approve these requests.

## Customised data tables available to universities
Download the list of customised tables now out of embargo and available to all CONZUL members.
- List of customised data tables available to universities (updated March 2026) Excel spreadsheet, 88 KB

### List of customised data tables available to universities (updated March 2026)
Excel spreadsheet, 88 KB

## Statistical data packages
Data packages produced for CONZUL members each contain an extensive series of tables.
The main variables for each dataset have been cross-tabulated by a number of supplementary variables. These detailed data tables have not been updated for several years. They are not for current periods. We update these on request to maximise the benefit of the universities’ allocated hours.
Time series for current data requests can be provided under the Stats NZ CONZUL agreement.
Data packages available online:
- Census of Population and Dwellings
- Disability statistics
- International travel and migration
- New Zealand income survey super SURF
- Student debt, income, and repayments
- Time use survey 2009/10 supplementary tables
- Vital statistics: births and deaths
Data packages available on request:
- Household economic survey
- Household labour force survey
- New Zealand income survey supplement
To request an update to any of the tables please email info@stats.govt.nz .

## Confidentialised and synthetic unit record files
Confidentialised unit record files (CURFs) can be requested but in recent years researchers have preferred microdata access.
Synthetic unit record files (SURFs) can also be requested. SURFs mimic the statistical properties of real microdata and are useful for teaching and learning purposes, or as a source of unit-record data for developing analytical methods or statistical processes.

## University contact officers
Your university contact officer can help you access customised data.
